facebook.caption: Pacific Boat on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo in Cửa Lấp is one of those spots that quietly earns its 4.7-star reputation. Sitting right along the waterfront edge of Phu Quoc, it draws visitors who want to get out on the water without the fuss of a big tour package. Whether you're heading out to explore nearby islands or simply soaking in the coastal atmosphere, this is a solid launching point. Practical tip: arrive a little early, especially in peak season, to sort your booking before the crowds show up.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the boats bob at the dock as the morning light hits the water at Pacific Boat. This little waterfront gem in Cửa Lấp is your starting line for some of the best on-water adventures Phu Quoc has to offer. Show up early, grab your spot, and let the sea do the rest.

instagram.caption: Pacific Boat in Cửa Lấp is your gateway to the water in Phu Quoc. Rated 4.7 stars by 169 visitors, this waterfront spot is perfect for anyone ready to explore beyond the shore. Tip: get there early in peak season.
instagram.video_caption: Boats, blue water, and open horizons. Pacific Boat in Cửa Lấp is where your Phu Quoc sea adventure begins. Rated 4.7 stars and worth every bit of it.

tiktok.caption: Your boat day in Phu Quoc starts here. Pacific Boat in Cửa Lấp is rated 4.7 stars for good reason. Get there early! #PhuQuoc #PacificBoat #VietnamTravel #IslandHopping #BoatLife
